'''ngazhama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huckstery|huckstery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huckstery|huckstery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngazhama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæzhæmæth|ngæzhæmæth]] || [[word:ngæzhæmæj|ngæzhæmæj]] || [[word:ngæzhæmæsh|ngæzhæmæsh]] || [[word:ngæzhæmæ|ngæzhæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazhazhamath|ngazhazhamath]] || [[word:ngazhazhamaj|ngazhazhamaj]] || [[word:ngazhazhamash|ngazhazhamash]] || [[word:ngazhazhama|ngazhazhama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazhamath|ngazhamath]] || [[word:ngazhamaj|ngazhamaj]] || [[word:ngazhamash|ngazhamash]] || [[word:ngazhama|ngazhama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazhafmafth|ngazhafmafth]] || [[word:ngazhafmafj|ngazhafmafj]] || [[word:ngazhafmafsh|ngazhafmafsh]] || [[word:ngazhafmaf|ngazhafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazhamatha|ngazhamatha]] || [[word:ngazhamaja|ngazhamaja]] || [[word:ngazhamasha|ngazhamasha]] || [[word:ngazhamaka|ngazhamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazhamath|ngazhamath]] || [[word:ngazhamaj|ngazhamaj]] || [[word:ngazhamash|ngazhamash]] || [[word:ngazhama|ngazhama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazhamathal|ngazhamathal]] || [[word:ngazhamajal|ngazhamajal]] || [[word:ngazhamashal|ngazhamashal]] || [[word:ngazhamakal|ngazhamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazhamaathatha|ngazhamaathatha]] || [[word:ngazhamaajaja|ngazhamaajaja]] || [[word:ngazhamaashasha|ngazhamaashasha]] || [[word:ngazhamaaka|ngazhamaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazhamathan|ngazhamathan]] || [[word:ngazhamajan|ngazhamajan]] || [[word:ngazhamashan|ngazhamashan]] || [[word:ngazhamakan|ngazhamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazhamathaoro|ngazhamathaoro]] || [[word:ngazhamajaoro|ngazhamajaoro]] || [[word:ngazhamashaoro|ngazhamashaoro]] || [[word:ngazhamakaoro|ngazhamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
